command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Current log files (which is active?) ==="
ls -la /tmp/openclaw/*.log 2>/dev/null | tail -3

echo ""
echo "=== Most recent log: last telegram/reason/tool activity ==="
LATEST=$(ls -t /tmp/openclaw/*.log 2>/dev/null | head -1)
echo "active log: $LATEST"
grep -oE '"reason":"[^"]*"|tool policy removed [0-9]+ tool|"chatId":-1003934415467' "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null | tail -15

echo ""
echo "=== Reason summary in latest log ==="
grep -oE '"reason":"[^"]*"' "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null | sort | uniq -c

echo ""
echo "=== Did agent process anything (tool policy fired)? ==="
grep -c "tool policy removed" "$LATEST" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Telegram pending ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('pending:', json.load(sys.stdin)['result'].get('pending_update_count'))" 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
